recentWorkSync.summary: Worktree was clean; latest completed work is 영역 04 전술판 모바일 드래그 UX 적용.

instructionUpdate.summary: Added the minimal durable rule from the latest work: global DOM side effects must use scoped utilities or an explicit cleanup contract with regression coverage.

guardVerify.summary: Harness validation, design guard, diff guard, lint, typecheck, full Vitest suite, SQL contract check, and evidence guard passed.

issuesObserved: The latest mobile drag work exposed a repeatable risk: direct body/document state writes can conflict with other runtime locks if cleanup is not explicit.
missedEvidence: No browser runtime evidence is required for this documentation-only sync.
harnessImprovementProposal: Keep the prevention as a compact documented rule; do not add a new guard until a concrete false negative recurs.
retrospective.reason: The rule is durable because it governs shared global DOM side effects while staying independent of the specific tactics screen design.
